regions.text: This is his hair. It is short.
This is her hair. It is long.
Where are her ears? They are under her hair.
Her hair is over her ears.
This is his face. His eyes, his nose, and his mouth are parts of his face.
It has a face. This is the face of the clock. The clock has two hands, a long hand and a short hand. The long hand is at 5. The short hand is between 7 and 8.
